keyEvents.text: Lisandro Martínez (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Lisandro Martínez because of an injury.
Substitution, Argentina. Leandro Paredes replaces Nico González.
Leandro Paredes (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Argentina. Nahuel Molina replaces Gonzalo Montiel.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Substitution, Spain. Pedri replaces Fabián Ruiz.
Substitution, Argentina. Facundo Medina replaces Cristian Romero because of an injury.
Substitution, Argentina. Giuliano Simeone replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Enzo Fernández (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Cristian Romero (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Second yellow card to Enzo Fernández (Argentina) for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Martín Zubimendi replaces Rodri.
Substitution, Spain. Eric García replaces Aymeric Laporte.
Substitution, Argentina. Marcos Senesi replaces Julián Alvarez.
Goal! Spain 1, Argentina 0. Ferran Torres (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nico Williams with a headed pass.
Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
